title: S2 Sandbox Events
description: JSON Schema for all events sent via S2 (StreamStore) by the sandbox. Events are appended to an S2 stream named '{S2_STREAM_PREFIX}:{sandboxId}' (default prefix: 'agent-session').

sandbox.init.description: Emitted when a sandbox run starts.

workspace.description: Absolute path to the workspace root (e.g. '/workspace').

promptPreview.description: First 2000 characters of the user prompt.

metadata.description: Sanitized metadata object passed by the caller, or null.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event was emitted.

sandbox.ready.description: Emitted once the inner SDK session ID becomes known.

sandbox.complete.description: Emitted when the sandbox run finishes successfully (not aborted).

sessionId.description: Inner SDK/Codex session identifier (may be undefined if session was never established).

sandbox.cancelled.description: Emitted when the sandbox run is cancelled or aborted.

sessionId.description: Inner SDK/Codex session identifier (may be undefined).

sandbox.error.description: Emitted when the sandbox run fails with an exception (and was not aborted).

sessionId.description: Inner SDK/Codex session identifier (may be undefined).

session.event.description: Wrapper for every raw event from the inner SDK session stream. The sandbox intentionally does NOT reinterpret the inner 'event' payload — it forwards it unchanged for platform-side interpretation.

sessionId.description: Inner SDK/Codex session identifier (may be undefined early in the session).

event.description: Raw SDK protocol event, passed through unchanged. Can be a notification ({ method, params }), a server request ({ id, method, params }), a protocol reply ({ id, result } or { id, error }), or a parse error ({ type: 'parse_error', line, error }).
